title: Graham Hancock REVEALS Where The Ark Of The Covenant Is Hidden
summary: Graham Hancock discusses his discovery of Ethiopian claims about the Ark of the Covenant being housed in Aksum. He describes witnessing religious ceremonies and learning about the Chapel of Saint Mary of Zion where Ethiopians believe the Ark is kept.

key_claims.claim: Ethiopians claim the Ark of the Covenant is kept in a chapel beside the 16th century Church of Saint Mary of Zion in Aksum
The Ark of the Covenant is fundamental to Ethiopian culture despite Ethiopia being largely a Christian country and the Ark being a pre-Christian relic
